items.description: Crash on I-76 eastbound between .4 miles east of Exit 342: US 13/30 WEST - GIRARD AVE/PHILA ZOO and .4 miles west of Exit 343: SPRING GARDEN ST/HAVERFORD AVE. There is a lane restriction.
